CREATE TABLE test_dates (dt DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY dt;
SELECT timestamp_sub(MONTH, 1, timestamp_sub(DAY, 5, toDateTime('2023-03-01 12:00:00'))) AS nested_result;
CREATE TABLE test_events (id UInt32, event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, timestamp_sub(DAY, 7, event_time) FROM test_events WHERE event_time > timestamp_sub(MONTH, 1, toDateTime('2023-06-01 00:00:00'));
SELECT id, timestamp_sub(YEAR, 1, timestamp_sub(HOUR, 2, event_time)) FROM test_events;
SELECT timestamp_sub(WEEK, 1, (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM test_events)) AS last_week_event_time;
